From The Desk Of Kim Keen

Dear entrepreneur,

If you want to generate 5–10 qualified appointments per month from LinkedIn...

and finally stop wasting hours posting content that gets ignored...

Then this offer is going to change your life.

Here’s why:

I’m Tim Keen, and I’ve spent years building and refining LinkedIn systems that generated over $4.7M in inbound agency revenue - and ultimately allowed me to sell that business.

Back then, I was doing what most people do: posting regularly, guessing at what might work, and hoping something would finally land.

But every day, I tracked what worked and what didn’t, testing posts, optimizing my profile, and figuring out what actually turned attention into appointments.

Then, one day, something clicked. I created a content and DM system that generated qualified inbound leads like clockwork-even with just 30 minutes a day.

We realized: It’s not about posting more. It’s about posting right, engaging strategically, and turning attention into actual revenue.

So that’s exactly what we did, again and again.

And the results? We achieved 5–10 qualified appointments per month using a predictable system—and we did it without ads, automation tools, or burning out on content.

We were so confident, we even started teaching it to others just like you.

And it worked every time.

Then we wondered whether the same strategy would work for someone who wasn’t a marketing expert or agency founder...

Enter one of our students:

At just a few months into their business, they wanted to start attracting clients from LinkedIn—but they had no idea what to post and had never booked a call from the platform.

We gave them the formula.

And within 30 days, they booked 6 qualified discovery calls—without any new tech, ads, or complicated funnels.

So we decided to package everything we taught them, putting it into The 30-Day LinkedIn Sprint.

And we made it affordable enough so we could get it into the hands of anyone who wanted consistent LinkedIn leads—without wasting time.

And the results? They were the exact same for our students:

"I followed the checklist every day and booked 3 calls in Week 2 alone—it just works."

"I used to get 1 like per post. Now I’m getting comments, DMs, and actual sales calls—finally."

It almost felt too good to be true, but it was years of hard work being boiled down into the simplest, most easy-to-understand format possible.

And now, it’s all yours.

Tim Keen
